channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: 2025Emma/vibe-coding-cn
item.description: (no description)

item.title: asklokesh/claudeskill-loki-mode
item.description: Multi-agent autonomous startup system for Claude Code

item.title: scanopy/scanopy
item.description: Clean network diagrams. One-time setup, zero upkeep.

item.title: pranshuparmar/witr
item.description: Why is this running?

item.title: Chevron7Locked/lidify
item.description: Lidify is built for music lovers who want the convenience of streaming services without sacrificing ownership of their library. Point it at your music collection, and Lidify handles the rest: artist discovery, personalized playlists, podcast subscriptions, and seamless integration with tools you already use like Lidarr and Audiobookshelf.

item.title: antvis/Infographic
item.description: 🦋 An Infographic Generation and Rendering Framework, bring words to life with AI!

item.title: HugoSMPnet/HugoSMP-Client
item.description: Lade dir jetzt den HugoSMP Client herunter und erhalte ein gratis Netherite Starterkit

item.title: rendercv/rendercv
item.description: CV/resume generator for academics and engineers, YAML to PDF

item.title: agentskills/agentskills
item.description: Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

item.title: ClashConnectRules/Self-Configuration
item.description: (no description)

item.title: ruvnet/wifi-densepose
item.description: Production-ready implementation of InvisPose - a revolutionary WiFi-based dense human pose estimation system that enables real-time full-body tracking through walls using commodity mesh routers

item.title: Rackarr/Rackarr
item.description: Visual rack layout designer for homelabbers

item.title: batrachianai/toad
item.description: A unified interface for AI in your terminal.

item.title: parcadei/Continuous-Claude
item.description: Context management for Claude Code. Hooks maintain state via ledgers and handoffs. MCP execution without context pollution. Agent orchestration with isolated context windows.

item.title: amilich/isometric-city
item.description: City building simulation game.

item.title: mullvad/gotatun
item.description: Userspace WireGuard® Implementation in Rust

item.title: VibiumDev/vibium
item.description: Browser automation for AI agents and humans

item.title: chaogei/windsurf-account-manager-simple
item.description: (no description)

item.title: cheyao/icepi-sbc
item.description: A low-cost H3 single-board computer capable of running Linux with DDR3

item.title: tiann/hapi
item.description: App for agentic coding - access coding agent anywhere

item.title: antonmedv/textarea
item.description: A notes webapp

item.title: danieldev23/trafexia
item.description: (no description)

item.title: apple/ml-sharp
item.description: Sharp Monocular View Synthesis in Less Than a Second

item.title: timescale/pg_textsearch
item.description: PostgreSQL extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search. Postgres OSS licensed.

item.title: facebookresearch/sam-audio
item.description: The repository provides code for running inference with the Meta Segment Anything Audio Model (SAM-Audio), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

item.title: cyl19970726/poly-sdk
item.description: (no description)

item.title: gemini-cli-extensions/conductor
item.description: Conductor is a Gemini CLI extension that allows you to specify, plan, and implement software features.

item.title: google/A2UI
item.description: (no description)

item.title: leedrake5/unredact
item.description: A simple tool for reading in poorly redacted documents and reproducing their origional form

item.title: AndyMik90/Auto-Claude
item.description: Autonomous multi-session AI coding

item.title: FunAudioLLM/Fun-Audio-Chat
item.description: Fun-Audio-Chat is a Large Audio Language Model built for natural, low-latency voice interactions.

item.title: eyeblech/cinecli
item.description: CineCLI is a cross-platform command-line movie browser built with Python.

item.title: focus-creative-games/leanclr
item.description: LeanCLR is a lean, cross-platform implementation of the Common Language Runtime (CLR).

item.title: bellard/mquickjs
item.description: Public repository of the Micro QuickJS Javascript Engine

item.title: karol-broda/snitch
item.description: a prettier way to inspect network connections

item.title: jlongster/tigma
item.description: (no description)

item.title: remorses/tuitube
item.description: Download videos from the command line with a TUI

item.title: muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
item.description: A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.

item.title: open-tinker/OpenTinker
item.description: OpenTinker is an RL-as-a-Service infrastructure for foundation models

item.title: 3dg1luk43/ha_washdata
item.description: Home Assistant integration to detect washer cycles from smart plug power, match programs, and estimate time remaining

item.title: ertugrulcetin/immersa
item.description: Open Source Web-based 3D Presentation Tool

item.title: mmarinovic/tailwindsql
item.description: (no description)
